scripts.build:local: tsc && pug ./src --out ./dist --hierarchy -O '{"baseHref":"/"}' && copyfiles res/**/* dist/ && copyfiles -u 1 src/**/*.css dist && tailwindcss -i ./src/style.css -o ./dist/style.css
scripts.build:gh_pages: tsc && pug ./src --out ./dist --hierarchy -O '{"baseHref":"/a-eq-b/"}' && copyfiles res/**/* dist/ && copyfiles -u 1 src/**/*.css dist && tailwindcss -i ./src/style.css -o ./dist/style.css
scripts.dev: bun run build:local && bun run start
scripts.deploy: bun run clean && bun run build:gh_pages && gh-pages -d dist --nojekyll -m "$MESSAGE"
